commands.ragnarmmo.admin.player.info.sta: Stats -> LVL:%%s EXP:%%s STAT:%%s | JOB:%%s Lv.%%s JEXP:%%s SP:%%s | STR:%%s AGI:%%s VIT:%%s INT:%%s DEX:%%s LUK:%%s
commands.ragnarmmo.admin.player.reset.al: Reset ALL stats and skills for %%s.
This will reset ALL stats and skills for %%s. Add 'confirm' to proceed.
Your character has been fully reset by an admin.
commands.ragnarmmo.admin.player.reset.sk: Your skills have been reset by an admin.
commands.ragnarmmo.admin.player.reset.st: Your stats have been reset by an admin.
commands.ragnarmmo.cart.missing_skill: You don't have the Cart Strength skill yet.
commands.ragnarmmo.get: LVL:%%s EXP:%%s STAT:%%s | JOB:%%s JEXP:%%s SKILL:%%s | STR:%%s AGI:%%s VIT:%%s INT:%%s DEX:%%s LUK:%%s MANA:%%s
commands.ragnarmmo.summary: LVL:%%s EXP:%%s STAT:%%s | JOB:%%s (%%s) JEXP:%%s SKILL:%%s | STR:%%s AGI:%%s VIT:%%s INT:%%s DEX:%%s LUK:%%s MANA:%%s
commands.ragnarmmo.stats.summary: LVL:%%s EXP:%%s STAT:%%s | JOB:%%s Lv.%%s JEXP:%%s SKILL:%%s | STR:%%s AGI:%%s VIT:%%s INT:%%s DEX:%%s LUK:%%s MANA:%%s
message.ragnarmmo.passive_skill_assign_e: Cannot assign passive skills to hotbar!
screen.ragnarmmo.skill_wheel.title: Skill Wheel
mod.ragnarmmo.description: Adds adaptive levels and stat growth to mobs.
mod.ragnarmmo.name: Ragnar Mob Stats
screen.ragnarmmo.overlay.instructions.mo: Drag the box to move it.
screen.ragnarmmo.overlay.instructions.re: Drag the bottom-right corner to change its size.
screen.ragnarmmo.overlay.name: Name: %%s
screen.ragnarmmo.overlay.title: HUD Overlay
screen.ragnarmmo.title: Ragnar Stats
screen.ragnarmmo.skills.title: Skills
skill.ragnarmmo.first_aid.desc:
Passive Skill.
Provides passive HP regeneration while not in combat (out-of-combat).
skill.ragnarmmo.survival_instinct.desc:
Passive Skill.
Grants a defense bonus when HP falls below a critical threshold.
skill.ragnarmmo.sword_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack damage when equipped with a Sword class weapon.
skill.ragnarmmo.two_hand_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack damage when equipped with a Two-Handed Sword.
skill.ragnarmmo.bash.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (100 + 30 * Level)%% ATK.§r
At Level 6+, gain chance to stun targets.
skill.ragnarmmo.provoke.desc:
Active Skill.
Taunts an enemy, decreasing their Physical Defense but increasing their Attack Power.
skill.ragnarmmo.one_hand_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack damage when equipped with a One-Handed Sword.
skill.ragnarmmo.endurance.desc:
Active Skill.
Increases Magic Defense and grants resistance to flinch/stun effects for a duration.
skill.ragnarmmo.magnum_break.desc:
Active Skill (Fire AoE).
§eDamage: (120 + 20 * Level)%% ATK.§r
§cCosts: 30 SP and 15%% Max HP.§r
Grants +20%% Fire Damage for 10s.
skill.ragnarmmo.increase_hp_recovery.des:
Passive Skill.
§bImproves natural HP regeneration by +(MaxHP/500 + 5*Level) per 10s.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.spear_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical Attack Power and Accuracy when equipping a Spear weapon.
skill.ragnarmmo.pierce.desc:
Active Skill. Requires Spear.
§eDamage: (100 + 10×Lv)%% ATK × N hits§r
N = §a1 hit§r (small) / §e2 hits§r (medium) / §c3 hits§r (large enemy).
skill.ragnarmmo.spear_stab.desc:
Active Skill.
Stabs an enemy with the spear, pushing them back.
skill.ragnarmmo.spear_boomerang.desc:
Active Skill.
Throws the spear to attack an enemy from a distance.
skill.ragnarmmo.brandish_spear.desc:
Active Skill (Spear AoE).
§eDamage: (100 + 40 * Level)%% ATK in a cone.§r
Range increases with Level and while mounted.
skill.ragnarmmo.two_hand_quicken.desc:
Active Skill.
Increases attack speed with two-handed swords.
skill.ragnarmmo.auto_counter.desc:
Active Skill.
Defensive stance that blocks an attack and counters.
skill.ragnarmmo.bowling_bash.desc:
Active Skill (Colliding Hits).
§eDamage: (500 + 50 * Level)%% ATK.§r
Deals a second hit if targets collide.
skill.ragnarmmo.one_hand_quicken.desc:
Quest Skill.
Increases attack speed using 1-handed swords.
skill.ragnarmmo.peco_peco_ride.desc:
Passive Skill.
Allows you to ride a Peco Peco.
skill.ragnarmmo.cavalier_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Restores ASPD while riding a Peco Peco.
skill.ragnarmmo.staff_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Magic Attack (MATK) when equipped with a Staff or Rod.
skill.ragnarmmo.spell_knowledge.desc:
Passive Skill.
Reduces the variable cast time of all magical spells.
skill.ragnarmmo.mana_control.desc:
Passive Skill.
Improves natural SP regeneration while standing still or walking.
skill.ragnarmmo.magic_amplification.desc:
Active Skill.
Amplifies your magic power for the next spell, increasing its damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.elemental_affinity.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases damage dealt with Fire, Water, Wind, and Earth elements.
skill.ragnarmmo.magic_guard.desc:
Active Toggle.
Creates a barrier that consumes SP instead of HP when taking damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.arcane_regeneration.desc:
Passive Skill.
Dramatically increases SP regeneration while sitting or resting.
skill.ragnarmmo.overcast.desc:
Active Toggle.
Allows spells to be cast with increased power at higher SP cost and cast time.
skill.ragnarmmo.increase_sp_recovery.des:
Passive Skill.
Improves natural SP regeneration rate.
§bRegen: +(MaxSP / 500 + 3 * Level) per 10s.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.sight.desc:
Active Skill.
Reveals hidden enemies in a 7x7 area for 10 seconds.
skill.ragnarmmo.napalm_beat.desc:
Active Skill.
Ghost property attack in a 3x3 area.
§eDamage: (70 + 10 * Level) %% MATK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.soul_strike.desc:
Active Skill.
Summons spiritual bolts to strike an enemy.
§eDamage: (100%% * Bolts) MATK.§r
§bBolts: 1 + floor((Level-1)/2). Extra damage to Undead.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.safety_wall.desc:
Active Skill.
Magic shield that blocks short-range physical attacks.
§bDuration: (5 + 5 * Level) seconds or until hits reach limit.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.cold_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Strikes a target with magical ice spears falling from the sky.
§eDamage: (100%% * Level) MATK (Water).§r
skill.ragnarmmo.frost_diver.desc:
Active Skill.
Ice attack with a chance to freeze the target.
§eDamage: (100 + 10 * Level) %% MATK.§r
§bFreeze Chance: (35 + 3 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.stone_curse.desc:
Active Skill.
Curse that gradually petrifies the enemy.
§bSuccess: (20 + 4 * Level) %%. Consumes 1 Red Gemstone.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Strikes a target with flaming meteors falling from the sky.
§eDamage: (100%% * Level) MATK (Fire).§r
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_ball.desc:
Active Skill.
Shoots a fiery ball that explodes upon impact.
§eDamage: (70 + 10 * Level) %% MATK (Splash).§r
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_wall.desc:
Active Skill.
Places walls of fire that block and damage enemies.
§eDamage: 50%% MATK per hit.§r
§bHits: (4 + Level). Walls last up to 20s.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.lightning_bolt.desc:
Active Skill.
Calls down magical lightning bolts to strike the target.
§eDamage: (100%% * Level) MATK (Wind).§r
skill.ragnarmmo.thunder_storm.desc:
Active Skill.
Rain of lightning that causes area damage.
§eDamage: (100%% * Level) MATK (Splash).§r
skill.ragnarmmo.monster_property.desc:
Active Skill.
Analyzes a target to reveal its HP, SP, and elements.
skill.ragnarmmo.fire_pillar.desc:
Active Skill.
Places a fire trap that detonates on contact.
skill.ragnarmmo.sightrasher.desc:
Active Skill.
Expels fireballs from Sight to push back enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.meteor_storm.desc:
Active Skill.
Causes random fire meteors to shower down, with a chance to stun (Fire).
skill.ragnarmmo.water_ball.desc:
Active Skill.
Fires powerful water bursts if the user is on or near water.
skill.ragnarmmo.ice_wall.desc:
Active Skill.
Erects an impenetrable magical wall of solid ice.
skill.ragnarmmo.jupitel_thunder.desc:
Active Skill.
Fires an electric sphere that violently pushes back enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.frost_nova.desc:
Active Skill.
Frozen detonation that freezes all nearby enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.lord_of_vermillion.desc:
Active Skill.
Summons a massive thunderstorm that smites the area and blinds enemies (Wind).
skill.ragnarmmo.storm_gust.desc:
Active Skill.
Conjures a lethal blizzard that severely damages and freezes enemies (Water).
skill.ragnarmmo.earth_spike.desc:
Active Skill.
Summons earth spikes from the ground to hit the target.
skill.ragnarmmo.heavens_drive.desc:
Active Skill.
Invokes earth spikes in a large area.
skill.ragnarmmo.quagmire.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates a swamp that reduces enemy speed, AGI, and DEX.
skill.ragnarmmo.bow_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical Attack damage and Range when equipped with a Bow.
skill.ragnarmmo.critical_shot.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Critical Hit Rate percentage.
skill.ragnarmmo.wind_walker.desc:
Active Party Buff.
Increases Movement Speed and Flee Rate for yourself and party members.
skill.ragnarmmo.kiting_instinct.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bIncreases damage based on distance from the enemy.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.owls_eye.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bPermanently increases DEX by +1 per Level.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.vultures_eye.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bIncreases Bow Range and Hit Rate by +1 per Level.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.improve_concentration.de:
Active Skill.
§bAGI and DEX +(2 + Level)%% for 60s.§r
Detects hidden enemies in a 3x3 area around the user.
skill.ragnarmmo.double_strafe.desc:
Active Skill. Requires Bow.
§eDamage: (100 + 10 * Level)%% ATK x 2 hits.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.arrow_shower.desc:
Active Skill. Requires Bow.
§eDamage: (75 + 5 * Level)%% ATK to all targets in a 3x3 area.§r
Pushes enemies back 2 blocks.
skill.ragnarmmo.skid_trap.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
Displaces the target in a random direction.
§bPush force increases with Level.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.land_mine.desc:
Active Skill (Trap - Earth).
§eDamage: [DEX * (3 + 4 * INT / 100) * (Level / 5)]§r
§cStun Chance: (30 + 5 * Level)%%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.ankle_snare.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
§bImmobilizes the target for (5 * Level) seconds.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.shockwave_trap.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
§bDrains (15 + 5 * Level)%% of target's Max SP.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.sandman.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
§cHas a (30 + 5 * Level)%% chance to cause Sleep in a 3x3 area.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.flasher.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
§cHas a (30 + 5 * Level)%% chance to cause Blindness.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.freezing_trap.desc:
Active Skill (Trap - Water).
§cHas a (30 + 5 * Level)%% chance to Freeze the target.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.claymore_trap.desc:
Active Skill (Trap - Fire).
§eDamage: [DEX * (3 + 4 * INT / 100) * (Level / 5)]§r
Explodes in a 5x5 area.
skill.ragnarmmo.remove_trap.desc:
Active Skill.
Disables your own trap to recover the Trap item.
skill.ragnarmmo.talkie_box.desc:
Active Skill (Trap).
Displays a custom message when triggered.
skill.ragnarmmo.beast_bane.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bIncreases ATK against Brute and Insect by +4 per Level.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.falconry_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bAllows the use of a Falcon and related skills.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.blitz_beat.desc:
Active/Passive Skill.
Command Falcon to hit enemies in 3x3 area.
§eDamage: [80 + 20*SteelCrow + 2*(DEX/10 + INT)] per hit.§r
§bHits: 1 + (Level-1)/2. Auto-procs based on LUK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.steel_crow.desc:
Passive Skill.
§bIncreases Blitz Beat damage by +6 per Level.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.detecting.desc:
Active Skill.
Falcon searches and reveals hidden enemies in a large area.
skill.ragnarmmo.spring_trap.desc:
Active Skill.
Falcon destroys an enemy trap from a distance.
skill.ragnarmmo.beast_strafing.desc:
Active Skill.
Powerful combo after Double Strafe against Brutes.
skill.ragnarmmo.divine_protection.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical defense (VIT-DEF) against Undead and Demon enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.demon_bane.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack (ATK) against Undead and Demon enemies.
skill.ragnarmmo.ruwach.desc:
Active Skill.
Reveals hidden enemies nearby and deals 145%% Holy MATK.
skill.ragnarmmo.pneuma.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates a 3x3 shield that blocks all long-range physical attacks for 10 seconds.
skill.ragnarmmo.teleportation.desc:
Active Skill.
Teleports the user to a random location or your saved spot.
skill.ragnarmmo.warp_portal.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates a portal to a saved point. Consumes 1 Blue Gemstone.
skill.ragnarmmo.heal.desc:
Active Skill.
Restores HP to an ally or yourself.
§bFormula: ((BaseLv + INT) / 8) * (4 + 8 * Level).§r
Deals holy damage to Undead.
skill.ragnarmmo.increase_agi.desc:
Buff Skill.
Temporarily increases AGI and movement speed.
§bBonus: +(2 + Level) Agility.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.decrease_agi.desc:
Active Skill.
Reduces enemy AGI and movement speed.
§bSuccess: (50 + 2 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.aqua_benedicta.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates Holy Water if and only if standing in water. Consumes 1 Empty Bottle.
skill.ragnarmmo.signum_crucis.desc:
Active Skill.
Reduces defense (DEF) of Undead and Demons in sight.
§bSuccess: (25 + 2 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.angelus.desc:
Buff Skill.
Increases VIT-DEF for the entire party by (5 * Level) %%.
skill.ragnarmmo.blessing.desc:
Buff Skill.
Temporarily increases STR, DEX, and INT.
§bBonus: +Level to stats.§r Cures Curse and Stone Curse.
skill.ragnarmmo.cure.desc:
Active Skill.
Removes Silence, Blindness, and Chaos from the target.
skill.ragnarmmo.mace_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical attack damage when equipped with a Mace or Hammer.
skill.ragnarmmo.faith.desc:
Passive Skill.
Permanently increases Max HP and Holy resistance.
skill.ragnarmmo.impositio_manus.desc:
Active Skill.
Temporarily increases the goal's attack power.
skill.ragnarmmo.suffragium.desc:
Active Skill.
Reduces cast time for an ally's next skill.
skill.ragnarmmo.aspersion.desc:
Active Skill.
Imbues weapon with Holy element (requires Holy Water).
skill.ragnarmmo.benedictio_sanctissimi_s:
Active Skill.
Imbues party's armor with Holy element.
skill.ragnarmmo.slow_poison.desc:
Active Skill.
Slows down HP loss from Poison.
skill.ragnarmmo.status_recovery.desc:
Active Skill.
Cures Freeze, Stun, and Stone curse.
skill.ragnarmmo.resurrection.desc:
Active Skill.
Revives a fallen player (consumes Blue Gemstone).
skill.ragnarmmo.magnificat.desc:
Active Skill.
Doubles natural HP/SP regeneration for the entire party.
skill.ragnarmmo.kyrie_eleison.desc:
Active Skill.
Shield that blocks physical damage or hits.
skill.ragnarmmo.gloria.desc:
Active Skill.
Greatly increases LUK for the entire party.
skill.ragnarmmo.lex_divina.desc:
Active Skill.
Silences a target, preventing skill usage.
skill.ragnarmmo.lex_aeterna.desc:
Active Skill.
Doubles damage the target will take on the next hit.
skill.ragnarmmo.turn_undead.desc:
Active Skill.
Chance to instantly eliminate an Undead enemy.
skill.ragnarmmo.magnus_exorcismus.desc:
Active Skill.
Great holy cross area that severely damages Demons/Undead.
skill.ragnarmmo.sanctuary.desc:
Active Skill.
Holy field that heals allies and damages/repels Undead.
§bHeal: (Level * 100) per sec. Duration: (3 + Level)s.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.dagger_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical ATK when equipped with a Dagger.
§bBonus: +(Level * 4) ATK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.double_attack.desc:
Passive Skill.
Chance to perform a double attack with Daggers.
§bSuccess: (5 * Level) %%. Damage: 200%% ATK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.improve_dodge.desc:
Passive Skill.
Permanently increases Flee Rate (Evasion).
§bBonus: +(3 * Level) Flee.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.steal.desc:
Active Skill.
Steal items from monsters.
§bSuccess: (10 + 2 * Level) %% adjusted by DEX diff.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.hiding.desc:
Active Skill.
Hide to avoid detection by enemies.
§cMovement: -(30 - 2 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.envenom.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (30 + 20 * Level)%% ATK (Poison Property).§r
§cChance to Poison: (10 + 4 * Level)%%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.detoxify.desc:
Active Skill.
Cures Poison status in a target or yourself.
skill.ragnarmmo.righthand_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Recovers main weapon damage when dual wielding.
§bPower: (70 + 10 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.lefthand_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Recovers offhand weapon damage when dual wielding.
§bPower: (30 + 10 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.katar_mastery.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases physical ATK with Katars.
§bBonus: +(3 * Level) ATK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.sonic_blow.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (300 + 50 * Level)%% ATK split across 8 hits.§r
§cStun Chance: 30%%.§r Requires Katar.
skill.ragnarmmo.cloak.desc:
Active Skill.
Advanced stealth that allows movement near walls.
§bMovement: -(30 - 3 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.grimtooth.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (100 + 80 * Level)%% ATK (Area).§r
Usable ONLY while hidden with a Katar.
skill.ragnarmmo.enchant_poison.desc:
Buff Skill.
Imbues weapon with Poison property.
§bChance to Poison on Hit: (2 + Level)%%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.poison_react.desc:
Active Skill.
Counters physical attacks with Poison damage.
skill.ragnarmmo.venom_dust.desc:
Active Skill.
Creates a toxic cloud that poisons enemies (Red Gemstone).
skill.ragnarmmo.venom_splasher.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (400 + 50 * Level)%% ATK.§r Requires Poisoned target.
skill.ragnarmmo.enlarge_weight_limit.des:
Passive Skill.
Permanently increases max weight capacity.
skill.ragnarmmo.discount.desc:
Passive Skill.
Buy items from NPCs at a discount.
skill.ragnarmmo.overcharge.desc:
Passive Skill.
Sell items to NPCs for a higher price.
skill.ragnarmmo.pushcart.desc:
Passive Skill.
Allows you to rent and use a cart.
skill.ragnarmmo.vending.desc:
Active Skill.
Open a shop to sell items from your cart.
skill.ragnarmmo.buying_store.desc:
Active Skill.
Open a shop to buy items from others.
skill.ragnarmmo.identify.desc:
Active Skill.
Identifies unknown items without Magnifiers.
skill.ragnarmmo.mammonite.desc:
Active Skill.
§eDamage: (100 + 50 * Level)%% ATK.§r
§cCosts: (100 * Level) Zeny.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.iron_tempering.desc:
Passive Skill.
Allows refining Iron from Iron Ore with higher success.
skill.ragnarmmo.steel_tempering.desc:
Passive Skill.
Allows refining Steel from Iron with higher success.
skill.ragnarmmo.enchanted_stone_craft.de:
Passive Skill.
Allows crafting elemental stones (Flame Heart, Mystic Frozen, etc).
skill.ragnarmmo.research_oridecon.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases success rate when forging Level 3 weapons.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_dagger.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of various daggers.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_sword.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of swords.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_two_handed_sword.d:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of two-handed swords.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_axe.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of axes.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_mace.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of maces.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_brass_knuckle.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of brass knuckles.
skill.ragnarmmo.smith_spear.desc:
Passive Skill.
Enables forging of spears.
skill.ragnarmmo.finding_ore.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases discovery rate of ores from monsters.
skill.ragnarmmo.hilt_binding.desc:
Passive Skill.
Grants extra §6+1 STR§r, §6+4 ATK§r, and +10%% buff duration.
skill.ragnarmmo.research_weaponry.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Physical ATK and Hit Rate.
§bBonus: +(2 * Level) ATK and HIT.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.repair_weapon.desc:
Active Skill.
Allows repairing damaged weapons and armor.
skill.ragnarmmo.skin_tempering.desc:
Passive Skill.
Increases Fire resistance (+5%% per Level) and Neutral DEF.
skill.ragnarmmo.hammer_fall.desc:
Active Skill.
Shockwave that can stun enemies in a 5x5 area.
§bStun Chance: (20 + 10 * Level) %%.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.adrenaline_rush.desc:
Active Skill.
Increases ASPD with Axes and Maces for (30 + 20 * Level)s.
§bBonus: +30%% ASPD.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.weapon_perfection.desc:
Active Skill.
Negates all size penalties for the party for (10 + 10 * Level)s.
skill.ragnarmmo.over_thrust.desc:
Active Skill.
Increases Physical ATK for the party by (5 * Level) %%.
skill.ragnarmmo.maximize_power.desc:
Active Toggle.
Forces weapon damage to its maximum (100%% variance). Drains SP.
skill.ragnarmmo.full_adrenaline_rush.des:
Active Buff.
Adrenaline Rush that affects ALL weapon types.
skill.ragnarmmo.cart_termination.desc:
Active Skill.
Powerful attack with the Cart. Requires Adrenaline Rush.
§eDamage: (Level * CartWeight / 100) %% ATK.§r
skill.ragnarmmo.mining.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases mining speed and the chance to find rare ores/gems.
skill.ragnarmmo.woodcutting.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases chopping speed and the yield of wood logs.
skill.ragnarmmo.excavation.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases the chance to uncover artifacts or treasure when digging dirt/gravel.
skill.ragnarmmo.farming.desc:
Life Skill.
Increases the growth rate of crops and the yield at harvest.
skill.ragnarmmo.fishing.desc:
Life Skill.
Reduces time to bite and increases chance to catch rare fish or treasure.
skill.ragnarmmo.exploration.desc:
Life Skill.

item.ragnarmmo.daggers.glacial_shard.des: A fragment of eternal ice that never melts.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.volcanic_tooth.de: Forged from a tooth of a fire dragon.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.gale_dirk.desc: As swift as the wind itself.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.vein_seeker.desc: Seeking the pulsing life of its prey.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.shadows_embrace.d: Lost in the darkness of the void.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.mambas_kiss.desc: One bite is all it takes.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.ghostly_sting.des: Phases through armor like a phantom.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.valkyries_thorn.d: Bestowed upon the bravest of warriors.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.abyssal_fang.desc: Toughened by the pressure of the deep sea.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.twilight_carver.d: Separating the day from the night.
item.ragnarmmo.daggers.oathbreaker.desc: For those who walk their own path.
message.ragnarmmo.requires_bow: This skill requires a Bow or Crossbow!
